response:
In the last month the Azure‑PROD schema was updated to add the Project Sentinel pieces:

- Added a new resource group: rax-prod-sentinel-rg (for the Project Sentinel pilot).  
- NSG rules were updated on an rax-prod resource (log truncated in the source; the exact NSG target name is not fully available).  
- A new service principal was created for Sentinel (sp-sentinel-prod) and granted Contributor scoped to the rax-prod-sentinel* scope.

If you need the exact NSG rule/target details I can pull the full change log or query the Azure audit/NSG change records.
